title: Discounted Water Service * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Discounted Water Service * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY REGIONAL OFFICE ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water service discount for low-income older adults and adults with disabilities who are City of Albany water customers. Does not provide funds to pay for water bills. 250 Broadalbin Street SW Suite 2A Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with documented disabilities. Income limits also apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 928-6335 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM
